landing.heroSubtitle: Textara converts Arabic PDF documents into structured, right-to-left Word files — preserving layout, headers, and formatting automatically.
landing.heroNote: Free up to 50 pages/month · No credit card required
landing.featuresSubtitle: Not a generic OCR tool with Arabic as an afterthought — every part of the pipeline is designed for right-to-left text.
landing.howSubtitle: Three steps from PDF to editable Word document.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Create a free account and convert your first Arabic PDF in under a minute.

rtl.title: Full RTL support
rtl.desc: Preserves right-to-left direction and bidirectionality in exported DOCX files with high fidelity across all Arabic dialects.

layout.title: Smart layout detection
layout.desc: Advanced Detectron2 models identify columns, headers, paragraphs, and titles to reconstruct the original document structure.

gpu.title: GPU-powered OCR
gpu.desc: Runs on dedicated A10G GPUs via Modal. The Qari model processes each page with high accuracy and low hallucination rate.

cloud.title: Cloud storage
cloud.desc: Your files are stored securely on Cloudflare R2. Download the original PDF or the converted DOCX any time.

upload.title: Upload your PDF
upload.body: Drag and drop any Arabic PDF — scanned documents, books, reports, or forms.

process.title: AI processes it
process.body: The pipeline detects layout regions and runs OCR on each section in correct reading order.

download.title: Download DOCX
download.body: Get a clean, editable Word document with correct RTL formatting, ready to use immediately.

empty.title: No conversions yet
empty.body: Upload an Arabic PDF on the Convert page and run OCR to get an editable Word document.

convert.title: Convert
convert.subtitle: Upload Arabic PDFs and convert them to editable Word documents.

empty.title: No files yet
empty.body: Upload an Arabic PDF above to get started.

empty.title: Convert your first document
empty.body: Upload an Arabic PDF and Textara will convert it to an editable Word document, preserving layout and RTL text.
empty.note: PDF only · max 50 MB · free up to 50 pages/month

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start converting Arabic PDFs for free
signup.name: Full name
signup.checkInboxBody: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Click it to activate your account.
